description: Feature -> journey runbook inventory. Every FeatureRegistry feature has a docs/journeys/*.md runbook opening with a Site-owner expectation block. 'gaps' are expectation-vs-reality deltas found while authoring (documented under each runbook's Known limitations).

features.label: Activity feed
features.owner_expectation: Members post text/link/poll updates, share, and bookmark; a single home stream shows it all.

features.label: Reactions
features.owner_expectation: Members react to posts/comments with emoji; counts and reactor lists update instantly.
gaps: buddynext_reactors_limit filter is documented but not applied (reactor list hardcoded to 100)
emoji not allow-list-enforced server-side
reaction_count counter drift risk for non-post object types

features.label: Comments
features.owner_expectation: Members comment and reply (threaded) on posts; authors/admins can edit, delete, pin; empty/abusive content is rejected.
gaps: create route flattens all service errors to HTTP 400 (suspension 403 becomes 400 on create)
no GET /comments/{id} single route
single pin per object
no per-branch pagination for very large threads

features.label: Profiles & fields
features.owner_expectation: Admin defines profile fields/groups; members fill them; visibility rules are honoured.

features.label: Spaces
features.owner_expectation: Members create open/private/secret spaces with the right visibility/join behaviour; custom types are now registrable.

features.label: Social graph
features.owner_expectation: Members follow, connect, block, and mute; these relationships gate visibility everywhere.

features.label: Notifications
features.owner_expectation: Community actions create in-app + email notifications members can manage and mark read.

features.label: Auth
features.owner_expectation: Members register, verify email, log in; social login and spam protection are available.

features.label: Search
features.owner_expectation: Members search people/spaces/posts; results respect blocks and shadow-bans.

features.label: Moderation
features.owner_expectation: Members report content; admins review a queue, strike, suspend; users can appeal.

features.label: Hashtags
features.owner_expectation: #tags auto-index from posts; members follow tags; a trending list surfaces.

features.label: Onboarding
features.owner_expectation: Owner picks a registration mode and invites people; new members get a guided onboarding wizard.
gaps: buddynext_reg_mode is stored but NOT enforced on REST signup (invite-only does not block open signup; only SocialLogin honours it)
invite tokens are generated/emailed but never redeemed (no registration-path caller consumes bn_invite)
no single-invite UI/REST route (bulk CSV only), no revoke endpoint
skip() does not cancel the nudge cron

features.label: Email verification
features.owner_expectation: New members confirm their email before full access; tokens are resendable and idempotent.

features.label: Announcements
features.owner_expectation: Admin pins an announcement to the top of every member's feed; members can dismiss it.
gaps: site_pin_expires_at is read/honoured but never written (no create or REST path sets expiry; pinned forever until dismissed)
no admin UI, no list/edit/un-pin endpoint
only the single newest announcement is site-pinned
creation hardcoded to manage_options (no space-moderator path, no delegation filter)

features.label: Sidebar widgets
features.owner_expectation: A community sidebar shows trending tags, suggested follows, and joined spaces; owner can toggle it in Settings -> Features.
gaps: cache-bust key mismatch: suggested_follows() writes key 'suggested-v2:{u}:{limit}' but invalidate_user() deletes 'suggested:{u}:3', so follow/unfollow/block never clear the suggested-follows cache (self-heals only on 300s TTL)

features.label: Gamification (bridge)
features.owner_expectation: Activate wb-gamification and members earn points/badges/levels for community activity with no wiring; tiles appear on profiles; badge/level-up events flow into notifications.
gaps: profile Points/Level/Badges tiles are injected via buddynext_profile_extra_data in templates only, NOT in REST

features.label: Jetonomy forums (bridge)
features.owner_expectation: Activate Jetonomy and forums appear inside the community with unified nav (Discussions rail link, space Forum tab) and discussions included in search.
gaps: feed-sync of discussions into bn_posts is behind opt-in filter buddynext_jetonomy_feed_sync (default off)

features.label: WPMediaVerse DM + media (bridge)
features.owner_expectation: Activate WPMediaVerse and members can DM + share media inside the community; BN blocks/mutes are respected; messages create BN notifications.
gaps: mvs_comment_created handler arg-order mismatch: bridge expects ($comment_id,$media_id) but partner fires ($media_id,$user_id,$comment_id,$content,$source) -> lightbox->activity comment sync gets wrong IDs (bridge fix needed)

features.label: Career Board jobs (bridge)
features.owner_expectation: Activate the Career Board and job posts surface in community search; applications create notifications.
gaps: thinnest of the four bridges: jobs indexed into bn_search_index only (NO hashtag indexing, despite a HOOKS.md note implying otherwise)
job expiry de-feeds bn_posts but does not de-index search

features.label: Outbound webhooks
features.owner_expectation: Owner registers webhook endpoints and external systems get signed POSTs on 14 community events (member/post/space/connection/reaction/comment/moderation).
gaps: the 'webhooks' opt-in toggle is NOT enforced at runtime (service/listener/routes wired unconditionally, no is_enabled('webhooks') guard) -> deliveries fire even with the toggle off
attempt column never incremented on retry
silent auto-deactivate after 3 failures with no re-activate route
Free cap of 1 endpoint
